CLINICAL NOTE
Date of Visit: 03/15/2024
Patient: John A. Doe
DOB: 1965-04-22

Attending Physician: Dr. Martinez
Referring Provider: Chen, NP

CHIEF COMPLAINT:
Follow-up for hypertension and type 2 diabetes mellitus.

ASSESSMENT:
1. Hypertension, uncontrolled (I10)
2. Type 2 diabetes mellitus with hyperglycemia (E11.65)

Dx: Community-acquired pneumonia
Diagnosis: Chronic kidney disease, stage 3

MEDICATIONS:
Medications: Lisinopril 10mg daily, Metformin 500mg twice daily, Atorvastatin 40mg nightly
Rx: Amoxicillin 500mg three times daily for 7 days

PLAN:
Continue current antihypertensive therapy. Recheck labs on 04/01/2024.
Follow up with Dr. Thompson in 4 weeks.
Patient educated on diet and exercise. Return visit scheduled for March 28, 2024.
